name: Zurich Vicarage Tart (Zuerich)
recipeInstructions:
(Units: 100 g ó 1/2 oz; 1 dl ó 1/2 fl oz ò/5 cup; 180 oC ó50
oF; 200 oC ô00 oF; 230 oC ô50 oF; 250 oC ô75 oF; 2.5 cm ñ inch)
1. Make a shortcrust pastry using the ingredients listed.
2. Line a 24 cm wide flan ring with the pastry.
3. Mix the ingredients for filling 1 together and spread on the base of the flan ring.
4. Cover the filling with thinly sliced apple halves, allowing space for the jam to penetrate.
5. Spread half the raspberry jam over the sliced apples.
6. Bake at 200°C for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and cover the apples with the remaining raspberry jam.
8. Bake for a further 10-15 minutes.
